vocab.meaning: kiến thức rộng/am hiểu sâu rộng
vocab.example: I was attracted to Liberal Arts because of the immense breadth of knowledge it offers across various disciplines.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt nghề nghiệp/thực tế
vocab.example: The vocational appeal of Nursing was a decisive factor, as I wanted a degree that led directly to a stable career.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò/ham học hỏi về trí tuệ
vocab.example: It was purely intellectual curiosity that drove me to major in Theoretical Physics; I simply wanted to understand how the universe works.

vocab.meaning: triển vọng nghề nghiệp thu nhập cao
vocab.example: While I enjoy coding, I can't deny that the lucrative career prospects in Data Science influenced my choice.
I chose International Relations specifically for its multidisciplinary nature, blending history, economics, and politics.
Studying Computer Science will pave the way for me to enter the burgeoning field of Artificial Intelligence.
I decided on Psychology after seeing the profound impact that mental health counseling had on my local community.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng linh hoạt (có thể áp dụng vào nhiều lĩnh vực)
vocab.example: I opted for a degree in Mathematics because it provides a set of transferable skills that are highly valued in any industry.
Marine Archaeology is a very niche field, but it perfectly combines my twin passions for history and diving.

vocab.meaning: quá trình đào tạo học thuật khắt khe/bài bản
vocab.example: I selected this law school primarily for its reputation for providing rigorous academic training and critical thinking skills.
